name: mission-docs-fragmentation
description: Mission system docs split across 6 files: ov-mission.md (RFC, 129K), ov-mission-implementation.md (contract, 27K), ov-mission-usage.md (guide, 8K), mission-lifecycle-audit, adr-graph-engine-lifecycle, mission-system-audit. Recommend index after epic #13 closes.

name: onboarding-guide-gaps
description: Onboarding guide missing: no spec-writing format guide, no mail protocol examples, no hook system intro, no graph engine gate walkthrough. CLAUDE.md excellent but lacks conceptual intro. Proposed 6-part structure: concepts (10m), prerequisites (5m), workflows (15m), command ref (10m), troubleshooting (5m).

name: doc-freshness-assessment-20260404
description: Freshness snapshot: 7 docs ≤7 days old, 9 docs 8-21 days old, 5 docs 3+ weeks stale. Stale: ov-mission.md (129K, overlaps with other docs), epic-13-*.md (both 3w old), mission-e2e-smoke.md (295 byte stub). Epic #13 targets ov-mission-implementation DoD.
